evals.prompt: Run obsidian-process-notes for the newest clipping.
evals.expected_output: Reads one unprocessed clipping, updates only `03 Resources/Wiki`, appends to `Wiki-Log.md`, moves the clipping unchanged to `03 Resources/Clippings/Processed/`, and reports created/updated pages.

evals.prompt: obsidian-build-wiki: process the clippings about AI and work.
evals.expected_output: Selects relevant unprocessed clippings, integrates them into German wiki pages tagged `🤖`, updates `Index.md` and `Wiki-Log.md`, preserves uncertainty, and moves processed clippings unchanged.

evals.prompt: Are there any new clippings to process into the Wiki?
evals.expected_output: Checks `03 Resources/Clippings` excluding `Processed`; if files exist, offers or performs a small scoped batch, otherwise reports that there are no unprocessed clippings.
